title: Reconcile conflicting cross-study cell-type labels
context: Backlog — tie-break policy (PLAN §16 Q4). Reconcile conflicting cross-study cell-type labels with a documented tie-break policy. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Define and apply a tie-break policy to reconcile conflicting cross-study cell-type labels, every decision sourced.
acceptanceCriteria: Conflicting labels enumerated with their sources.
Documented tie-break policy applied; each reconciliation cites its evidence.
